feat.critical_failure: The creature regains no Hit Points.
feat.failure: The creature regains half the normal Hit Points.
feat.name: Plague Rat
feat.success: The creature regains Hit Points normally.
feat.text: Your bites carry a cursed infection. When you hit and deal damage to a creature with a jaws Strike while in hybrid or rat shape, the creature is cursed until the start of your next turn. Whenever they regain Hit Points during that time, they must attempt a Fortitude save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Curse
traits.text: A curse is an effect that places some long-term affliction on a creature. Curses are always magical and are typically the result of a spell or trap. Effects with this trait can be removed only by effects that specifically target curses.

traits.name: Disease
traits.text: An effect with this trait applies one or more diseases. A disease is typically an affliction.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text:
This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to primal magic.
